blockingIssues.description: On signing-key mismatch, verifyTokenLiveness in src/auth/guards.ts:146 throws a generic 'Session token signature is invalid — token may be expired or revoked' message without explicitly diagnosing key mismatch or providing signing-key alignment remediation. The feature's expected behavior requires mismatched signing-key paths to fail with explicit remediation. The test suite also does not assert remediation text content, so this gap is not regression-guarded.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated environment.md MORS_RELAY_SIGNING_KEY description to reflect fail-closed startup enforcement (was incorrectly documenting empty-key as fail-open risk).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update mors-global-worker skill scope to include native-identity-core and onboarding-handle-profile milestones, since it is actively assigned to features in those milestones.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both reviewers flagged: .factory/skills/mors-global-worker/SKILL.md:12 lists only relay-foundation/global-async-messaging/realtime-watch/developer-launch-path, but features.json assigns native-identity-core features to mors-global-worker. Two independent reviewers confirmed the same gap.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance to mors-global-worker skill for stabilization/fix features where the strict 'red test first → green' TDD loop does not apply because failing tests already exist. Workers should be able to mark followedProcedure=true for justified stabilization deviations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker for native-identity-core-fix-deploy-tests-flyctl-env-compat marked followedProcedure=false for a justified stabilization deviation; this pattern will recur for all fix features. Same observation from round 1.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Skill procedure should require manual-check skip rationale when workers mark followedProcedure=true without recording any interactive checks for internal-only primitives.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewer for native-identity-core-fix-relay-signing-key-fail-closed noted handoff has followedProcedure=true but no interactive checks or skip rationale.
